title: unified-adapter.ts lacks @ai-summary
body: src/infra/llm/genkit/adapters/unified-adapter.ts (~497 lines) has no @ai-summary. It was not read during this session because the file path didn't match the initial scan pattern. It should be added.
rationale: The unified-adapter is the central Genkit wrapper — a coding agent hitting it cold won't understand the error classification hierarchy or the outputJsonSchema vs outputSchema distinction without reading the full file.

title: genkit-tools.ts has @ai-summary but should be verified
body: src/infra/llm/genkit/tools/genkit-tools.ts already has @ai-summary (lines 5-7 per earlier scan). Verify it's substantive and not just a code restatement, per the convention established during this task.
rationale: Pre-existing @ai-summary was not audited for quality during this session. If it merely restates what the code says, it should be improved.
